channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: His house burned down. He used the insurance money to build PopSockets.
item.description: Does a consumer hardware company need to get on the VC treadmill to succeed? Eleven years and 290 million products sold across 115 countries later, Po...

item.title: USB Hubs Can Save You Lots of Hassles—Here Are 5 We Like Best in 2026
item.description: Ditch the dongles. These multiport USB hubs will maximize your connectivity options.

item.title: US and EU police shut down LeakBase, a site accused of sharing stolen passwords and hacking tools
item.description: Authorities say LeakBase was "one of the world’s largest online forums for cybercriminals," and maintained an archive of hacked databases containing h...

item.title: Google settles with Epic Games, drops its Play Store commissions to 20%
item.description: Google has dropped its commission, charging a 20% service fee and an optional 5% to use its billing services. It will also offer a new process for thi...

item.title: MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this week
item.description: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

item.title: Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI Mode to all US users
item.description: Canvas in AI Mode is available to U.S. users in English for creating plans, projects, apps, and more.

item.title: Which iPhone 17 Model Should You Buy?
item.description: The iPhone 17e is here to fill out Apple’s smartphone lineup. Our primer on the differences and similarities of these iPhones can help you shop.

item.title: Trump’s War on Iran Could Screw Over US Farmers
item.description: The Middle East supplies a huge amount of the world’s fertilizer. Conflict in the region has sent prices soaring ahead of the critical spring planting...

item.title: How Vulnerable Are Computers to an 80-Year-Old Spy Technique? Congress Wants Answers
item.description: A pair of US lawmakers are calling for an investigation into how easily spies can steal information based on devices’ electromagnetic and acoustic lea...

item.title: This 5.1 Soundbar Bundle Is $100 Off
item.description: Sony's upgraded Bravia Theater System 6 packs a complete home audio setup into a single box.
